chapter_context.summary: Hannah's magnificent song of thanksgiving; the wickedness and greed of Eli's sons; Samuel's spiritual growth; a prophecy against Eli's lineage.

outline.text: Hannah's Prayer of Thanksgiving and Prophetic Song
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Hannah's Prayer of Thanksgiving and Prophetic Song (2:1-10), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Samuel.

outline.text: The Evil Conduct of Eli's Sons (Hophni and Phinehas)
outline.explanation: This section focuses on The Evil Conduct of Eli's Sons (Hophni and Phinehas) (2:11-17), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Samuel.

outline.text: Samuel's Faithful Ministry and Hannah's Other Children
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Samuel's Faithful Ministry and Hannah's Other Children (2:18-21), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Samuel.

outline.text: Eli's Ineffective Rebuke of His Sons
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Eli's Ineffective Rebuke of His Sons (2:22-26), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Samuel.

outline.text: A Man of God Prophesies Judgment on Eli's House
outline.explanation: This section focuses on A Man of God Prophesies Judgment on Eli's House (2:27-36), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Samuel.

key_themes.title: Sovereignty of God
key_themes.description: God raises up the humble (Hannah, Samuel, David) and humbles the proud (Eli's sons, Saul).

key_themes.title: The Heart vs. Outward Appearance
key_themes.description: God looks at the inner spiritual character, not physical stature or social status.

devotional.question: Reflecting on the events of Chapter 2, how does this encourage you to trust God when circumstances look bleak?
How does this chapter prompt you to examine the sincerity of your own heart before the LORD?

cultural_historical.title: Transition to Monarchy
cultural_historical.text: Israel's request for a king represents a major cultural shift from a tribal league led by temporary judges to a centralized dynastic monarchy.
